role: Health System Transformation Research Project Coordinator
confirmation_text: Your application was submitted successfully. Thank you for applying. You are currently submitted to this job.
resume_uploaded: resume.pdf (this role's tailored PDF — verified attached, filename read back from form)
cover_uploaded: cover_letter.pdf (this role's tailored PDF — verified attached)
sponsorship_answer: Need Sponsorship = Yes (truthful); Authorized to work in US = Yes
flow_steps_completed: 1. Candidate Profile (email-first account create + resume parse + name/phone/address/how-heard=LinkedIn + USC/Psychology/Master's education + resume.pdf & cover_letter.pdf upload)

2. Candidate Forms (employment application: 5 parsed work experiences verified+cleaned of Drive links/markup; Work-in-US=Yes, Need-Sponsorship=Yes, Over-18=Yes, Previously-Employed=No; initials YC/YC + signature)
5. Job Specific Questions (6 free-text essays grounded in real corpus, Jamie's voice; salary range accepted; learned via LinkedIn)
6. Voluntary Self-ID packet (Disability=No + signature; Veteran=Not a protected veteran + signature)
icims_mechanics_notes: OHSU iCIMS = externalcareers-ohsu.icims.com. Email-first flow at /login (input#email + #enterEmailSubmitButton) renders the full single-page Candidate Profile for a new applicant. Form fields live in an iframe (frame index ~1). Custom AJAX dropdowns (icimsdropdown-ajax=1) need: open via a[id="<select-id>_icimsDropdown"] (use attribute selector, NOT escaped-dot CSS id — the id contains literal dots), then press_sequentially into input.dropdown-search to fire the AJAX filter (fill() alone does NOT trigger it), then click the matching li:visible. For static custom dropdowns (search=0, e.g. EEO Gender/Race, How-hear) set native select value + dispatch change via JS. iCIMS parses uploaded resume into name/email/work-history/education but NOT into Education School/Degree (those stayed empty + required) — fill manually. hCaptcha present but data-size=invisible (self-clearing badge, never an interactive challenge). Signature checkboxes: use Patchright .check() (idempotent); JS checked=true + .click() double-flips to false. Multi-step packet: Profile->Forms->Questions->EEO->JobQuestions->SelfID(disability THEN veteran as two sub-forms). Confirmation: /job?mode=submit_apply with green 'submitted successfully' banner.
